mapper.select: SELECT * FROM patra_registry.reg_prov_api_param_map WHERE deleted = 0 AND lifecycle_status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND provenance_id = #{provenanceId} AND operation_type_key IN (#{operationTypeKey}, 'ALL') AND operation_code = #{operationCode} AND std_key = #{stdKey} AND effective_from <= #{now} AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > #{now}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN operation_type_key = #{operationTypeKey} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, effective_from DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m.operation_code, m.std_key ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.operation_type_key = #{operationTypeKey} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, m.effective_from DESC, m.id DESC ) AS rn FROM patra_registry.reg_prov_api_param_map m WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND m.lifecycle_status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND m.provenance_id = #{provenanceId} AND m.operation_type_key IN (#{operationTypeKey}, 'ALL') AND m.operation_code = #{operationCode} AND m.effective_from <= #{now} AND (m.effective_to IS NULL OR m.effective_to > #{now}) ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 ORDER BY t.std_key
